summary: REQ-2 is fully implemented in the Hero component diff — the background now references the AI illustration image with a navy gradient overlay, and all existing hero content is preserved. REQ-1 (generating and saving the actual image file) is not evidenced in the diff, as no new image file was added to frontend/public/assets/generated/.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate an AI illustration image and save it to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-ai-illustration.dim_1920x1080.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files and no binary/image assets were added. The image file referenced by the Hero component does not appear to have been created in the repository.
